info.english_meaning: to cover to wear to pull to dress
info.hindI_arTa: QakanA vastra pahananA oढ़nA poSAKa DAraRa karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: vasyati stamBane vaste CAdane vasayed vaset ' (Slo. 187) iti devaH  smftO iti vopadevaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'ABiH prajABiriha saMvaseya' (tE॰brA॰1.21.2.1) saMvaseya=sAkaM vaseyam
'na saMvasecca patitErna cARqAlErna pulkasEH' (manu॰4.79) ukto'rTaH
'saMvasATAM svarvidA samIcI' (vA॰saM॰11.31) AcCAdayatamityAha samA nArTaH
'taTA saMvasatastasya munInAmASrame suKam' (rA॰3.15.28) saMvasataH kaYcitkAlaM sTitiM kurvataH
'tAM samuzya niSAM kftsnAM praBAte pratyabuDyata' (rA॰3.12.1) niSAM samuzya=rAtriM kzapayitvA
'prAyeRADamamaDyamottamaguRaH saMvAsato jAyate' (paYcata॰1.250) saMvAsaH saMsargaH
'SfRvanvAco manuzyARAM grAmasaMvAsavAsinAm' (rA॰2.49.4) saMvAsaH=sanniveSaH=nikarzaRaH=purAderbahirviharaRaBUH
'nASreyAnvE prAvArAn saMvivaste' (BA0 u0 268) saMvivaste=vaste saMvI anarTakO
'brahmacaryaM Bavati vivatsyAmi' (CAM0 u0 441) vi vatsyAmi vatsyAmi viSabdo nArTe viSezaM karoti vasa brahmacaryaM Svetaketavityatra kevalasya vaseH prayogadarSanAt
'manorame na vyavasizwa vastre' (Bawwi0 320) vyavasizwa=AcCAdayat
'SaSvatpurozA vyuvAsa devI' (f0 111313) vyuvAsa vibaBO vyuzwA Candasi vaservyucCaterarTe bahulaH prayogaH
'praTamA ha vyuvAsa sA DenuraBavadyame' (aTarva0 3101) sA rAtristamovyudasanaM kftavatI vipUrvo vasirvarjane vartata iti sAyaRaH
'dyumanto vi vasantu viprAH' (aTarva0 415) svasvavyApArezu viviDaM vartantAm ityarTaH aTavA vivasatiH paricaraRakarmA vivasantu havirBirdevAn paricarantu ityarTa iti ca saH
'purA vyavAtsId yadanantavIryaH' (BA0 pu0 3216) aDyavAtsIdityarTaH apUrvaScAyamanyatra muDA'nvezyotrArTe prayogaH

'kOwasAkzyaM tu kurvARAMstrInvarRAnDiArmiko nfpaH pravAsayed daRqayitvA brAhmaRaM tu vivAsayet' (manu0 8123).. vivAsayet rAzwrAnniHsArayet (kullUkaH) brAhmaRaM nagnaM kuryAt (govindarAjaH) brAhmaRasya vivAsastvaM vAso'paharaRaM gfhaBaNgo veti meDAtiTiH
'utkocajIvino dravyahInAH kftvA vivAsayet' (yAjYa0 1338) svarAzwrAt pravAsayediti mitAkzarA ArAtrivivAsamAcazwe rAtriM vivAsayati (hetumati ca 3126 sUtre vfttO) vivAso'tikramaRam
'vAsasI iva vivasAnO ye carAvaH' (tE0 saM0 15101) vivasAnO viparidaDatO
'icCannito vivasituM gaRayan svamAsAn' (BA0 pu0 33117)
'astrahetormahAbAhuramitAtmA vivAsitaH' (BA0 vana0 862) vivAsitaH pravAsitaH
'rAmasya gAtramasi durvahagarBaKinnasItAvivAsanapawoH karuRA kutaste' (uttara0 210) vivAsanaM svadeSAnnirvAsanam
'tatrEkAM rajanIM vyuzya praBAte rAma gamyatAm' (rA0 31140) vyuzya uzitvA nArTo vinA
'dvizwavyuzitamasvAdu pUti cAnnaM vivarjayet' (suSruta0 sU0 46518) vyuzitaM paryuzitam kftarAtriparivAsam
'priyErvivAso bahuSaH saMvAsaScApriyEH saha' (BA0 ASva0 1634) vivAso viprayogaH dUre'vasTAnam

'vAsasI iva vivasAnO' (tE0 saM0 15101) arTavyaktyarTamiha punarnyAsaH anyonyasya viparivftte iva vAsasI DArayantO vede vasirvyucCanepi vartate taTA ca prayogaH--te devA mitrAvaruRAvabruvannidaM no vivAsayatamiti (tE0 saM0 648) vivAsayatam viBAtaM kurutamiti
'nizevya pAnaM madanIyamuttamaM niSAvivAsezu cirAd vimAdyati' (sOndara0 929) visaH samAptiravasAnam
'nyavasizwa tato drazwuM rAvaRaM prAvftad gfhAd' (Bawwi0 157) nyavasizwa pUrvanivasitaM vasanaM tyaktvA'nyad vasanaM paridaDAti sma (jayamaNgalA)
'pItErnivAsitA vastrEH' (go0 saM0 rA0 52722) nivAsitA AcCAditA
'rohiRIM nivasati' (somaH) (BA0 Salya0 3555) nivasati saMviSati
'yo'sO mAhizmatIM pUrIM nivAsayAmAsa' (vi0 pu0 4119) nivAsayAmAsa niveSayAmAsa
'tArpye ca kfttyaDIvAse cASvaM saMjYapayanti' (tE0 brA0 39201) aDIvAsa uparitana AcCAdanapawaH
'BasmanABi vAsayati' (tE0 saM0 2634) aBita AcCAdayatItyarTaH
'yastvAM rAjanmayA sArDamajinEH prativAsitam' (BA0 vana0 274) prativAsitaM saMvItam
'yannaH pravrAjayeH sOmya ajinEH prativAsitAn' (BA0 u0 3115) pratiSabdo DAtvarTAnuvAdI
'yadAsandyAmupaDAne yadvopavAsane kftam' (aTarva0 14265) upavAsane AcCAdane prAvaraRe AvaraRe pariDAne
